appointment_conversion.description: Did the agent successfully guide toward booking?

scoring.1: Caller lost interest due to agent behavior

objection_handling.description: Did the agent address concerns effectively?

scoring.5: All objections addressed with empathy and resolution
scoring.3: Basic handling, lacked depth on key objection
scoring.1: Ignored or argued with caller's concern

conversation_flow.description: Natural pacing, one question at a time, appropriate pauses

scoring.5: Flowed like a natural phone conversation
scoring.4: Mostly natural with minor awkward transitions
scoring.3: Some robotic patterns or stacked questions

information_accuracy.description: Did the agent provide correct practice information?

rapport_building.description: Did the agent build trust and show empathy?

compliance.description: No medical advice, no fabricated availability, proper boundaries

scoring.1: Gave medical advice or fabricated data
